description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire

You erupt a towering column of fire from a point within 30 feet. All creatures in a 10-foot burst take 3d6 fire damage (basic Reflex your class DC). The ground in the burst is briefly superheated — until the start of your next turn, any creature that enters or starts its turn in that area takes 1d6 fire damage.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
